The coordination law

Not a swarm.
A proof-governed
institution.

Large multi-agent systems coordinate to maximum effect when every action becomes bounded work, observable trace, evidence package, validator judgment, risk state, Chronicle memory, settlement decision, and reusable capability.

Run the institution →Open advanced engine
Public-safe by design. This page runs entirely in your browser. It has no forms, no accounts, no analytics, no cookies, no storage, no wallet connection, no network request, no token route, no transaction, and no production authority.

Why this matters

Maximum autonomy is not the objective.
Maximum verified work is.

The lab turns the theory into a tactile local experience: choose a mission, run the proof cycle, watch agents coordinate through gates, inspect the trace, and export a public-safe Evidence Docket.

Output
candidate result
Proof
trace + packet
Validation
verifier gate
Settlement
accept/reject
Reuse
capability memory

Evidence Docket preview
Every run emits a reviewable object.
The generated JSON is local and public-safe. It demonstrates the object model without transmitting anything.
